text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, check it out.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know her! That's Happy Meek!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Her trainer's Kiryuin, one of the best in the scene.
Even Trainer Kashimoto recognizes her talents.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
She looks the spacey type, but she's not. Don't let
your guard down.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Well I say bring it on! If she can give me
a challenge, that's all the—

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hm? Where'd she go?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huh? I swear she was just there...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Spying... How thrilling...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: When did you...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I heard you say... Trainer Kiryuin is one of the
best trainers... So I thought you two must be...
spying on me.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Why would we be spying?!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Let me tell you something, we're learning from
the best—Trainer Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, so we don't need to spy on you! We're
more than capable of beating you!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Tch... My trainer is... just as amazing.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
...I've learned a lot from her. She's... always
thinking of new training courses for me.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
And so does Trainer Kashimoto. She monitors our
conditions every day and adjusts our training
schedule accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin is... very athletic. She can do...
parkour.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Haha, don't think we have a rebuttal for that one!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, though. Trainer Kashimoto recently
mastered doing forward tumbles! One at a time,
at least.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm sorry for all the trouble Meek caused!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: No... I also apologize.
